series_metadata.series_description: This series includes certificates authorizing performance of breath tests, certificate authorizing performance of laboratory tests using alcohol method for enzymatic, an application for laboratory permit for alcohol analysis and a breath alcohol permit application. These documents confirm application and certification of performance of breath testing and alcohol analysis.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain the application and copies of certificates in Bureau of Alcohol and Drug Testing for two years, then transfer to Record Retention for one year., Paper: Shred
